column1: # OWASP ZAP baseline rule overrides for the PR DAST workflow.
#   The scan target is http://localhost:3001 inside an ephemeral CI runner.
#   Several ZAP rules check for transport-security and browser-isolation
#   headers that only apply to publicly served HTTPS. Failing the PR on
#   them would block every PR even when the production deployment is
#   correctly configured. They are validated separately by the prodlike
#   integration tests and by the production reverse proxy.
# Re-evaluate this list whenever the workflow target changes.

column3: Strict-Transport-Security only relevant on HTTPS production hosts.
CSP header tested at the edge proxy, not on localhost CI build.
Permissions-Policy header set by the production proxy.
Timestamp disclosure: noisy on Next.js bundle hashes.
Information disclosure - suspicious comments: noisy in dev source maps.
